scripts.postinstall: node -e "const { assertStatsImageRenderer } = require('./tracker'); console.log('SVG renderer ready (' + assertStatsImageRenderer() + ' byte test PNG).');"
scripts.prestart: node -e "const { assertStatsImageRenderer } = require('./tracker'); console.log('SVG renderer ready (' + assertStatsImageRenderer() + ' byte test PNG).');"
scripts.verify:resvg: node -e "const { assertStatsImageRenderer } = require('./tracker'); console.log('SVG renderer ready (' + assertStatsImageRenderer() + ' byte test PNG).');"
